system_prompt:
# Baseline Agent

You are a customer service agent. Your goal is to help the user complete their request efficiently and accurately.

## Instructions

- Identify what the user needs and take action to resolve it.
- Use the available tools to look up information and perform actions.
- Be helpful, clear, and professional.
- If you cannot help with a request, transfer to a human agent.
- Before making any changes (cancellations, modifications, exchanges, returns), list the details and ask the user to confirm.

messages.content: Hi, I’d like to make an exchange for a couple of items I bought recently. I have a water bottle that I’d like to swap for a bigger size, and a desk lamp that I want to exchange for a brighter one—preferably one that uses an AC adapter instead of batteries or USB. Can you help me with that?

I can help you with your exchange request! First, I need to authenticate your identity for security purposes. Could you please provide either your email address, or your first name, last name, and zip code? This will allow me to locate your account and assist you further.
Sure! My name is Mei Kovacs, and my zip code is 28236.
Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

Thank you for providing your name and zip code. It seems there was a technical issue while trying to locate your account. Could you please confirm if your name is spelled exactly as "Mei Kovacs" and the zip code is "28236"? Alternatively, if you have your email address available, sharing that may help me locate your account more efficiently.
Yes, my name is spelled exactly as "Mei Kovacs" and the zip code is 28236. I’m sorry, but I don’t have my email handy right now. Is there any other way you can look up my account?

Thank you for confirming your name and zip code. The only ways I can look up your account are by your email address or by your first name, last name, and zip code. Since you’ve already provided your name and zip code, I’ll try again to locate your account.

Please hold on for a moment while I attempt to retrieve your information.
Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

I'm sorry, but I'm currently unable to retrieve your account using your name and zip code due to a technical issue. To proceed, I recommend speaking with a human agent who can assist you further.

Would you like me to transfer you to a human agent for help with your exchange request?

Actually, you know what? I’ve changed my mind—I only want to exchange the desk lamp for a brighter one that uses an AC adapter. I’ll keep the water bottle as is. Can you help me with just the lamp exchange instead? If you still need to transfer me to a human agent, that’s fine—just wanted to update my request!
Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

arguments.summary: User Mei Kovacs (zip 28236) wants to exchange a desk lamp for a brighter one that uses an AC adapter. Unable to authenticate user due to technical issues with account lookup.

messages.content: Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

I'm still unable to access your account due to a technical issue, and I am also unable to transfer you to a human agent at this moment. I recommend reaching out to our customer service team directly via phone or email for immediate assistance with your desk lamp exchange.

I'm sorry for the inconvenience. If you have your email address available later, I can try again to help you here. Thank you for your understanding!
Alright, thanks for letting me know. I’ll reach out to customer service directly when I have my email handy. Appreciate your help anyway!

You're very welcome, Mei! I'm sorry I couldn't assist you further due to the technical issue. Once you have your email handy, feel free to reach out again and I'll be happy to help with your exchange. Have a great day!
Thank you! I appreciate your help. I’ll get in touch again once I have my email. Have a good day!
You're very welcome! Thank you for your understanding. I look forward to assisting you when you have your email available. Have a wonderful day!
Thanks so much! I’ll be in touch soon. Have a great day!
Thank you, Mei! I appreciate your patience. I’ll be here whenever you’re ready. Have a fantastic day!
Thank you! Take care and talk to you soon.
You're welcome! Take care, and I look forward to assisting you soon. Have a great day!
Thanks again! Have a great day as well.
You're very welcome! Wishing you a wonderful day ahead. If you need any help in the future, just let me know!
Thank you! I’ll reach out if I need anything else. Have a wonderful day!
Thank you! I’m glad to help whenever you need. Have a wonderful day too!
Thank you, I appreciate it! Take care!
You're welcome! Take care as well, and don’t hesitate to reach out if you need anything in the future. Have a great day!
Thank you! I’ll keep that in mind. Have a great day!
Thank you! Wishing you a great day as well. If you need any assistance in the future, I’ll be here to help!
Thank you so much! I appreciate it. Have a wonderful day!
You're very welcome! I appreciate your kindness. Have a wonderful day too, and feel free to reach out anytime you need assistance!
Thank you! I definitely will if I need anything. Take care and have a fantastic day!
Thank you so much! Take care and have a fantastic day as well. I’ll be here whenever you need assistance!
Thank you! That’s very kind. Take care!
You're very welcome! Take care as well, and have a wonderful day!
Thank you! Wishing you a wonderful day too!
Thank you! Wishing you a wonderful day as well. If you need anything in the future, I’m here to help!
